key_risks: June 16-17 FOMC or June 10 CPI surprise triggers tech/growth selloff given sticky 3.8% inflation
Semiconductor and Taiwan concentration vulnerable to geopolitical shock or AI sentiment reversal
Crowded momentum trade prone to sharp factor rotation after extended run
Gold pulls back if real rates rise or risk-on continues uninterrupted

portfolio.rationale: Strong semis momentum, 25% QoQ chip sales growth, AI capex surge; SMH leading with broad strength and low VIX supporting risk-on.
AI spending forecast $2.59T, software prices accelerating; XLK strongest sector trend with persistent leadership into June.
Semiconductor supply chain leverage with sustained momentum; benefits from AI demand and global electronics cycle.
$1.5T FY2027 defense request supports durable demand; ITA showing consistent momentum with geopolitical tailwinds.
Hedge against sticky inflation (PCE 3.8%, PPI 6%) and elevated geopolitical/policy uncertainty into June FOMC.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrate in AI/semiconductor leadership where momentum, fundamentals (chip sales +25% QoQ, AI capex +75%), and low volatility align, with defense and gold as diversifying ballast against inflation and macro risk.
rationale_summary: Overweight tech/semis momentum supported by strong AI capex and chip sales, with aerospace/defense and gold for balance.
